  <class name="edm::Wrapper"/>

  <class name="portabletest::TestSoALayout<128,false>"/>
  <class name="portabletest::TestSoALayout2<128,false>"/>
  <class name="portabletest::TestSoALayout3<128,false>"/>
  <class name="portabletest::SoABlocks2<128,false>"/>
  <class name="portabletest::SoABlocks3<128,false>"/>

  <class name="edm::Wrapper<portabletest::TestProductWithPtr>" persistent="false"/>

  
  
  
  
  
  
  
  <class name="edm::Wrapper" splitLevel="0"/>

  
  
  
  
  
  
  <class name="edm::Wrapper" splitLevel="0"/>

  <class name="edm::Wrapper" splitLevel="0"/>

  
  
  
  
  
  
  <class name="edm::Wrapper" splitLevel="0"/>

  
  
  
  
  
  
  <class name="edm::Wrapper" splitLevel="0"/>

  <class name="edm::StdArray"/>
  <class name="edm::StdArray"/>

  
  
    
  
  <class name="portabletest::SoAEvolutionZeroLayout<128,false>"/>
  
  <class name="edm::Wrapper" splitLevel="0"/>

  
  
    
    
  
  
    cDouble_ = new signed char[onfile.elements_];
             for (cms::soa::size_type i = 0; i < onfile.elements_; i++) {
                const double onFileValue = onfile.cDouble_[i];

                if (onFileValue >= INT8_MIN && onFileValue <= INT8_MAX) {
                    cDouble_[i] = static_cast<signed char>(onFileValue);
                } else {
                    // Warning could be inserted like this:
                    // printf("Warning: Value %f at index %i is out of int8_t range. Setting to 0.\n", onFileValue, i);
                    cDouble_[i] = static_cast<signed char>(0);
                }
             }
  
  <class name="portabletest::SoAEvolutionOneLayout<128,false>"/>
  
  <class name="edm::Wrapper" splitLevel="0"/>

  
  
    
    
  
  <class name="portabletest::SoAEvolutionTwoLayout<128,false>"/>
  
  <class name="edm::Wrapper" splitLevel="0"/>

  
  
    
    
  
  <class name="portabletest::SoAEvolutionThreeLayout<128,false>"/>
  
  <class name="edm::Wrapper" splitLevel="0"/>

  
  
    
    
  
  <class name="portabletest::SoAEvolutionFourLayout<128,false>"/>
  
  <class name="edm::Wrapper" splitLevel="0"/>

    
  
    
    
  
  <ioread sourceClass="portabletest::HostCollectionEvolutionFive::Layout" targetClass="portabletest::HostCollectionEvolutionFive::Layout" version="[2]" source="cms::soa::size_type elements_; edm::StdArray *cArray_" target="cArray_">
    cArray_ = new edm::StdArray<double, 4>[onfile.elements_];
             for (cms::soa::size_type i = 0; i < onfile.elements_; i++) {
                cArray_[i][0] = (double)onfile.cArray_[i][0];
                cArray_[i][1] = (double)onfile.cArray_[i][1];
                cArray_[i][2] = (double)onfile.cArray_[i][2];
                cArray_[i][3] = (double)onfile.cArray_[i][3];
             }
  
  <class name="portabletest::SoAEvolutionFiveLayout<128,false>"/>
  
  <class name="edm::Wrapper" splitLevel="0"/>
